problem id: 8a04fbe3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND SHR(2)

examples:
  11100001 -> 00001000
  01001101 -> 00000010
  10101110 -> 00100001
  10100111 -> 00101001
  00101011 -> 00001000
  10110100 -> 00100101
  10110011 -> 00001100
  10001111 -> 00100000
  11100101 -> 00101001
  01000001 -> 00000000

query: 01110110
predicted answer: 00010001
